subcodes.first_line: O Kazim! Restraining one's anger is among the characteristics of the righteous and the attributes of the free. As far as thou art able, be thou forbearing and patient [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا کاظم کظم غیظ از خصائص ابرار است و خصائل احرار تا توانی بردبار باش و متحمل
subcodes.subjects: @walking the spiritual path; spiritual wayfaring; the virtuous life, @symbolism, @tests and trials; sacrifice and suffering, @characteristics and conduct of true believers
